news.headline: LHC upholds govt’s policy abolishing free electricity units for power sector employees

<p>LAHORE: The Lahore High Court has upheld the federal government’s policy to monetise free electricity units for officers of the Water and Power Development Authority (Wapda) and power distribution companies, it emerged on Friday.</p>

news.headline: Could the Lebanon ceasefire lead to US-Iran talks breakthrough?
news.summary: Al Jazeera's Tohid Asadi discusses the prospect that the ceasefire in Lebanon could lead to a US-Iran peace deal.
